caption: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown and white striped shirt and a black headset with a microphone, is speaking in an indoor setting. She is positioned in front of a pale wall and a light-colored curtain that has blue accents on the left side. A small portion of a light-brown surface is visible behind her to the right. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a similar position, but her facial expressions shift slightly as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each shot. There are no other people or significant objects present, and the background remains static throughout the clip.
